No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on programming skills, with no direct or strong indirect link to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content has no connection to hunger, food production, or nutritional well-being.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course does not address health, well-being, or related medical/environmental targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and essential technical skills for employment (Target 4.4), making programming an "indispensable basic ability."
evidence: 程式設計儼然成為各行各業不可或缺的基本能力
幫助尚未具備程式設計基礎概念的學生

Gender Equality.reason: While ICT skills can potentially empower women (Target 5.b), the course does not explicitly address gender equality or design content for this purpose. The link is very indirect.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content has no connection to water, sanitation, or related environmental targets.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content has no connection to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides "indispensable basic ability" in programming, directly supporting technological upgrading and innovation for higher economic productivity and decent work (Targets 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 程式設計儼然成為各行各業不可或缺的基本能力
使之與他們所學之領域結合，達到真正應用的目標

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches information technology, data science, and web scraping, directly enhancing scientific research, technological capabilities, and innovation (Target 9.5, 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: By targeting "students who do not yet have the basic concepts of programming," the course directly promotes equal opportunity and reduces the digital skills gap (Target 10.3).
evidence: 幫助尚未具備程式設計基礎概念的學生

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course content has no connection to urban development, infrastructure, or community sustainability.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course content has no connection to consumption patterns, resource efficiency, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: The course content has no connection to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content has no connection to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: The course content has no connection to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The skill of "web scraping" (擷取網路資料) has a very tenuous, unspecified link to public access to information (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances information and communications technology skills, which are enabling technologies crucial for capacity-building and achieving other SDGs (Target 17.8).
